sam_w1.name: Chipped Katana
sam_w1.desc: A blade that has seen too many funerals.

sam_w3.name: Kurogane Blade
sam_w3.desc: Forged in the castle town of black iron.

sam_w4.name: Bloodfang Odachi
sam_w4.desc: Too heavy for a sane man. You are not sane.

sam_w5.name: Masamune's Sorrow
sam_w5.desc: It hums when drawn, like a mourner.

sam_a1.name: Straw Garb
sam_a1.desc: Smells of rice fields and rain.

sam_a2.name: Do-Maru Armor
sam_a2.desc: Lacquered chest plates of a fallen ronin.

sam_a3.name: Kurogane Mail
sam_a3.desc: Black iron rings, cold as the forge master.

sam_h1.name: Onigiri
sam_h1.desc: Restores 60 HP. Mother made these once.

sam_h2.name: Healing Salve
sam_h2.desc: Restores 150 HP. Bitter herbs, honest work.

sam_r1.name: Prayer Tag
sam_r1.desc: Revives a fallen ally at half HP.

biz_w1.name: Boxcutter
biz_w1.desc: From the office supply closet. It opened you first.

biz_w2.name: Brass Knuckles
biz_w2.desc: "A gift", they said. Gifts here have teeth.

biz_w3.name: Collapsible Baton
biz_w3.desc: Fits in a briefcase next to the spreadsheets.

biz_w5.name: Custom .45 "Severance"
biz_w5.desc: Your resignation letter, notarized in lead.

biz_a2.name: Tailored Suit
biz_a2.desc: Ginza cut. Blood comes out with club soda.

biz_r1.name: Defibrillator Kit
biz_r1.desc: Revives a fallen ally at half HP.

cyb_w1.name: Scrap Pistol
cyb_w1.desc: Printed in a basement. Jams politely.

cyb_w2.name: Mono-Knife
cyb_w2.desc: One molecule thick. Do not check the edge.

cyb_w4.name: Railgun "Whisper"
cyb_w4.desc: The last thing heard, and barely.

cyb_w5.name: Prototype Arc Cannon
cyb_w5.desc: Property of the Ministry. Finders keepers.

cyb_a3.name: Aegis Subdermal
cyb_a3.desc: Armor you cannot forget at home.

cyb_x1.name: Neural Charm
cyb_x1.desc: An old trinket, wired to your HUD. +25 max HP.

cyb_r1.name: Trauma Drone
cyb_r1.desc: Revives a fallen ally at half HP.

div_w1.name: Chrono Edge
div_w1.desc: Three lifetimes folded into one blade.

biz_docs.name: Shredded Ledger Page
biz_docs.desc: Half-destroyed accounting. Yui can reconstruct these.

cyb_scrap.name: Milspec Scrap
cyb_scrap.desc: Salvaged servo cores. Juno pays well for these.

key_shard1.name: Rift Shard: Vermilion
key_shard1.desc: A splinter of broken time. It shows a burning village.

key_shard2.name: Rift Shard: Cobalt
key_shard2.desc: A splinter of broken time. It reflects neon rain.

key_shard3.name: Rift Shard: Violet
key_shard3.desc: A splinter of broken time. It hums with static.
